appDescription.message: Smart CAGR calculator. Input any 3 values (Initial, Final, Time, Rate), auto-calculate the 4th. Works offline.

disclaimer.message: For informational purposes only. Results are estimates based on your inputs and are not guaranteed to be accurate, complete, or suitable for investment decisions.

insightDoubling.message: 💡 Your money will double in $YEARS$ years at this rate

insightBelowMarket.message: ℹ️ Below S&P 500 average. Consider diversifying.

insightHighReturn.message: ⚠️ Exceptional returns! This is significantly above market average.

viewChartsHint.message: 📊 Want to see growth charts and more features?

errorInvalidValue.message: Invalid value. Please enter a positive number.

errorCalculationFailed.message: Calculation failed. Please check your inputs.

explanationCAGR.message: Your investment of _PV_ grew to _FV_ over _N_ years, achieving a CAGR of _R_% annually.

explanationFV.message: Your _PV_ investment growing at _R_% annually will reach _FV_ in _N_ years.

explanationPV.message: To reach _FV_ in _N_ years at _R_% growth rate, you need to invest _PV_ today.

explanationTIME.message: Growing _PV_ to _FV_ at _R_% annual growth will take _N_ years.
